app.title: CS API Compliance Assessor
app.description: Test any OGC Connected Systems API endpoint against OGC 23-001 and OGC 23-002 requirements.
app.footer.disclaimer: This tool is unofficial and does not constitute OGC certification. Results are based on automated testing against the OGC 23-001 and OGC 23-002 standards and may not cover all edge cases.
landing.heading: OGC Connected Systems API Compliance Assessor
landing.subheading: Test any CS API endpoint against OGC 23-001 (Part 1) and OGC 23-002 (Part 2) requirements. Get detailed pass/fail results with full HTTP traces.
landing.error.unreachable: Could not reach this endpoint. Verify the URL and try again.
urlForm.label: CS API Landing Page URL
urlForm.demoPrompt: Try it with the OGC demo server:
urlForm.validation.invalidUrl: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
urlForm.validation.tooLong: URL must be 2048 characters or fewer
urlForm.validation.privateIp: Private and reserved IP addresses are not allowed
config.heading: Configure Assessment
config.error.noSession: No session ID provided. Please start from the landing page.
config.error.noDiscovery: Discovery data not found. Please start a new assessment.
config.error.startFailed: Failed to start assessment. Please try again.
selector.heading: Conformance Classes
selector.mutatingWarning: These tests will create, modify, and delete resources on the target endpoint. Only run against a test server, never a production system.
selector.destructiveConfirm: I understand these tests will mutate data on the target endpoint
selector.emptyState: No testable conformance classes were found for this endpoint.
selector.emptyStateHint: The endpoint may not declare conformance, or the declared classes are not yet supported by this tool.
auth.heading: Authentication (optional)
auth.credentialsNote: Credentials are sent only to the target endpoint and are not stored after the assessment completes.
progress.heading: Assessment in Progress
progress.polling: Live connection lost. Checking assessment status...
progress.connectionLost: Connection to the server was lost. This may happen if the server restarted or the session expired.
progress.cancelConfirm.title: Cancel Assessment?
progress.cancelConfirm.body: The assessment will stop and results collected so far will be available as a partial report.
results.heading: Assessment Results
results.notFound.heading: Assessment Not Found
results.error.notReady: Results are not yet available. The assessment may still be running.
results.error.notFound: Assessment not found. It may have expired (results are kept for 24 hours) or the ID is incorrect.
results.error.loadFailed: Failed to load assessment results. Please try again.
results.partial.banner: This assessment was cancelled and results are partial. They may not reflect full conformance.
results.disclaimer: This assessment is unofficial and does not constitute OGC certification. Results are based on automated testing against the OGC 23-001 and OGC 23-002 standards and may not cover all edge cases.
drawer.noExchanges: No HTTP exchanges recorded for this test.
